items.text: A startled goldfish
A tropical friend
A very tiny whale
Copenhagen at 4am. The light never fully leaves.
First time bending steel tube. Hands shaking.
48 hours. Four people. One weird game.
The constraint was: one typeface, one word.
A dream about a library that kept rearranging.
Remember: constraints breed creativity.
Zero dependencies. Maximum control.
The interface IS the content.
Make it weird, then make it legible.
Simplicity is not the absence of complexity.
A tiny scarf appeared!
A soggy beret floated up!
Miniature sunglasses!
When did you last make something just for fun?
What would you design if no one was watching?
What's the last thing that made you laugh out loud?
Do you dream in color?
What's the bravest thing you've ever made?
A rubber duck. Classic.
A single pearl rolls across the screen.
A sock. Just one sock.
A paper airplane unfolds into a heart.
A tiny origami tiger!
